install.name: YJ Accordion News Slider
install.author: YouJoomla.com
install.description: YJ ACCORDION NEWS SLIDER IS INSTALLED

param.name: get_items
param.label: News items categorie
param.description: In this categorie there must be min 1 news item published

param.name: nitems
param.label: Number of news items to display
param.description: Number of news items to display

param.name: specificitems
param.label: Show only specific news item
param.description: Show only specific news item id separated by comma: 1,2,3

param.name: sliderWidth
param.label: Default slider width
param.description: Usually wdth of the containing module

param.name: closedWidth
param.label: Closed slide width
param.description: Caclulate: Default width minus opened slide width divided by number of news items to display minus one. Example: 900 - 640 = 260 , 260 / 4 = 65

param.name: infoPosition
param.label: Position of the intro text
param.description: This is a absolute bottom position

param.name: autoSlide
param.label: Auto slide speed
param.description: If set to 0 slider will not slide on page load

param.name: moduleclass_sfx
param.label: Module Class Suffix
param.description: This class is default for Accordion slider. To fit your designs add your default module styling to this module class: Example moduletable_accslider add to template.css and apply your template module style to it
